subcodes.first_line: O most exalted Sha'ban! May all months be a sacrifice unto thee, even Ramadan and Muharram. They say that Sha'ban is a month [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شعبان معظم جمیع ماه ها حتی رمضان و محرم فدای تو باد گویند که شعبان ماهیست
subcodes.subjects: @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @service to others; to the Cause of God
